Section.Title: Description
Section.Paragraph: The SetAnisotropicFilterMode method allows anisotropic filtering to be enabled and configured for sampling from the texture. Requires the AnisotropicFiltering feature to be enabled when creating the renderer.

Note.Paragraph: Anisotropic filtering requires the AnisotropicFiltering feature to be supported and enabled on the renderer.

ArgumentList.ArgumentListEntry: True to enable anisotropic filtering, false to disable it.
The maximum anisotropy level to request. Use 0 to let the renderer select the best supported level.
